narrative:
Sherwood Village (precinct in Defiance County) has 488 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
